_comment: SLO-regression gate baselines. Each value is the p50 (median)
in nanoseconds from `cargo bench --bench pipeline` observed on
The gate in scripts/bench-gate.sh multiplies these by
current run's p50. 2.5x absorbs GitHub runner variance (cold
caches, noisy neighbors on shared hosts, ±20-30% per-run wobble)
Baselines are intentionally conservative — each value reflects a
high-end observation rather than the mean — so normal runs pass
without manual re-baselining after minor refactors. Update via
stabilizes, then commit the regenerated JSON.
